creator: gersom@pine.nl
text:
[root@aserver /usr/ports/databases/mysql55-server]# make
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for mysql-server-5.5.17
=> mysql-5.5.17.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.fi.muni.cz/pub/mysql/Downloads/MySQL-5.5/mysql-5.5.17.tar.gz

Apart from the fact that the mirror is down, version 5.5.17 is not available anymore on any mirror.

Fix: 

upgrade version to current stable (currently 5.5.19):

http://dev.mysql.com/downloads/mysql/#downloads
How-To-Repeat: build mysql55-server port
